nativeProps: React.FieldsetHTMLAttributes<HTMLFieldSetElement> with children, value, and onChange reserved

compositionPolicy.items: CheckboxGroupItem requires a CheckboxGroup ancestor, non-blank unique direct-item values, and renders one real checkbox.
compositionPolicy.validation: Minimum and maximum constraints count only enabled direct successful items, use provider-backed messages and custom validity on the first enabled native item, and suspend for disabled-only groups.
compositionPolicy.form: The group form attribute propagates to every item for external submission and reset.
